hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; pkg=$(echo "$f" | grep -oP "packages/\K[^/]+" | head -1); [ -n "$pkg" ] && cd /home/martin/projects/cz-agents-mcp && npm test --workspace="@czagents/$pkg" --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -8 || true'

bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; pkg=$(echo "$f" | grep -oP "packages/\K[^/]+" | head -1); [ -n "$pkg" ] && [ -f "/home/martin/projects/cz-agents-mcp/packages/$pkg/tsconfig.json" ] && cd /home/martin/projects/cz-agents-mcp && npx tsc -p packages/$pkg/tsconfig.json --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true'

bash -c 'cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; [[ "$cmd" == *"docker compose up -d"* && "$cmd" == *"91.98.119"* ]] && sleep 3 && ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_macbook martin@91.98.119.223 "docker ps --format \"{{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\" | grep cz-agents" || true'

bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ "$f" == *.env* || "$f" == *tokens.db* || "$f" == *secrets* || "$f" == *package-lock.json ]] && echo "BLOCKED: sensitive file — edit manually" && exit 2 || exit 0'
bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ "$f" == */dist/* ]] && echo "WARNING: editing generated dist/ file — use src/ instead" && exit 2 || exit 0'

bash -c 'cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; [[ "$cmd" == *"push --force"* || "$cmd" == *"push -f"* ]] && echo "BLOCKED: force push zakázán — použij --force-with-lease nebo potvrď manuálně" && exit 2 || exit 0'
